quotes.text: Hey everybody, it's Tuesday!

quotes.text: Girl, let me see your turtles.
quotes.author: Ryan Davis

quotes.text: This Quick Look is over!
quotes.author: Ryan Davis

quotes.text: Hit the golf button! Hit the golf button!
quotes.author: Ryan Davis

quotes.text: Oh shit, Bears can swim!
quotes.author: Ryan Davis

quotes.text: I can play Simon Says like a motherfucker.
quotes.author: Ryan Davis

quotes.text: I did not say, 'uh, uh, uh, uh, uh.'
quotes.author: Ryan Davis

quotes.text: You heard it here third.
quotes.author: Jeff Gerstmann

quotes.text: Anime is for jerks.
quotes.author: Jeff Gerstmann

quotes.text: This is a one-to-one loading screen... it loads in real time.
quotes.author: Vinny Caravella

quotes.text: Fun things are fun!
quotes.author: Yui Hirasawa

quotes.text: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: I'm an egotistical bastard, and I name all my projects after myself. First Linux, now git.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: Theory and practice sometimes clash. And when that happens, theory loses. Every single time.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: Only wimps use tape backup: real men just upload their important stuff on ftp, and let the rest of the world mirror it.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: Given enough eyeballs, all bugs are shallow.
quotes.author: Linus's Law (Eric S. Raymond)

quotes.text: The unexamined life is not worth living.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.text: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.text: Premature optimization is the root of all evil.
quotes.author: Donald Knuth

quotes.text: Make it work, make it right, make it fast.
quotes.author: Kent Beck
